offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual reconciliation processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Etsy sellers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try generating weekly reconciliation reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
